talismans.heading: Shop 22 Hand-Written Taoist Talismans
talismans.description: Buy authentic Fulu hand-written on ritual paper by a gaogong priest of Longhu Mountain Tianshi Mansion — personalized with your name, ritual-blessed with filmed consecration proof, ships to US & Europe.
talismans.chineseSub: 二十二符，均由龙虎山天师府高功道士亲书；坛前开光，仪式摄录为证。
